spec.title: Wind Direction
spec.description: Live compass heading for current wind direction. Requires the community Compass panel plugin (oceandatatools-compass-panel).

spec.title: Wind Speed & Direction Distribution
spec.description: Wind rose showing the joint distribution of wind speed and direction over the selected time range. Requires the community Operato Windrose panel plugin (operato-windrose-panel), which requires fields literally named wind_speed and wind_direction in a single frame. Grafana's rename transforms only change display names, not the underlying field name, so the two queries are joined on time and then run through 'Add field from calculation' (reduceRow, single included field) to produce genuinely renamed wind_speed/wind_direction fields.

spec.title: Wave Direction
spec.description: Mean wave direction. Requires the community Compass panel plugin (oceandatatools-compass-panel).

spec.title: Water Level / Tide (ft)
spec.description: Only reported by coastal NDBC stations with a tide sensor. Sourced from NOAA CO-OPS instead, for buoys matched to a nearby tide station.

spec.title: Next Tide
spec.description: Predicted next high and low tide, for buoys matched to a nearby NOAA CO-OPS tide station.

spec.title: Hours Until Next Tide Event
spec.description: Time remaining until the next predicted high and low tide; resets when each event passes. For buoys matched to a nearby NOAA CO-OPS tide station.

spec.title: Buoy & CO-OPS Station Location
spec.description: Plots the NDBC buoy's published coordinates alongside its auto-matched NOAA CO-OPS tide station, to visually confirm the match is sensible. The CO-OPS marker is absent for buoys with no nearby tide station.
